items.docs: Returns information about a driver who has authorized with the application.

params.name: from_time
params.description: Unix timestamp of the start of the query time range.

params.name: to_time
params.description: Unix timestamp of the end of the query time range.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of items to return. Default is 5, maximum is 50.

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset the list of returned results by this amount.

items.docs: Returns a list of payments made to a driver over the lifetime of their account with Uber.

params.description: Unix timestamp of the start of the query time range.

params.name: to_time
params.description: Unix timestamp of the end of the query time range.

params.description: Number of items to return. Default is 5, maximum is 50.

params.name: offset
params.description: Offset the list of returned results by this amount.

items.docs: Returns trip history for a driver partner.
